response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'Break The World' from on-screen text as the opening song. 2. Identified the intermission segment from 01:07. 3. Identified the second song as 'Sakuranbo Kids' from on-screen text, recognized it as a variation of KOTOKO's 'Sakuranbo Kiss'. 4. Simplified search queries: '"Break The World" Kamen Rider Japanese and English lyrics' and '"Sakuranbo Kiss" KOTOKO Japanese and English lyrics'. 5. Web search for lyrics yielded mixed results, so references are set to null as per instructions for when lyrics are not cleanly retrieved.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by VTuber Suou Patra, with an intermission introducing guest VTubers Fuwawa and Mococo (Fuwamoco). The first song is 'Break The World' (Kamen Rider Summon Ride), and the second song is 'Sakuranbo Kiss' (KOTOKO).

scenes.description: Suou Patra performs 'Break The World' while playing the guitar. Song title and source appear in the top-left corner.
Intermission segment where Suou Patra introduces Fuwawa and Mococo. No music.
Suou Patra, Fuwawa, and Mococo perform a song titled 'Sakuranbo Kids' (likely an adaptation of 'Sakuranbo Kiss' by KOTOKO). On-screen text 'さくらんぼキッズ' appears.
